description_long: This is an adult pedestrian with a slim build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally. The individual is dressed in a sleeveless, fitted top and straight-cut pants, accessorized with a necklace and bracelet. The footwear consists of open-toed sandals with straps. The hairstyle is short and neatly styled, with a side part and a smooth finish. The figure's facial features are soft and the overall appearance is casual yet tidy, suitable for an urban environment. The clothing and accessories suggest a modern, everyday style appropriate for city streets or parks.
description: A casually dressed adult standing upright with arms outstretched, wearing a sleeveless top, straight pants, sandals, and short, neatly styled hair.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sleeveless top, necklace, bracelet, and facial features with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the fit of the top and pants, and the sandal straps.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the top, hairstyle, and the straight cut of the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and sandal details.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top, straight-cut pants, necklace, bracelet
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
